recommendations.title: Maniac Cop
recommendations.overview: A killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City.

recommendations.title: Maniac Cop 3: Badge of Silence
recommendations.overview: A priest practicing the Voodoo arts resurrects Matt Cordell, who takes his badge and returns from the dead...again...to do his bidding.

recommendations.title: Maniac Cop 2
recommendations.overview: Undead cop Matt Cordell rises from the grave, and is after the criminals who murdered him in prison.

recommendations.title: Vigilante
recommendations.overview: New York City factory worker Eddie Marino is a solid citizen and regular guy, until the day a sadistic street gang brutally assaults his wife and murders his child. When a corrupt judge sets the thugs free, he goes berserk and vows revenge.

recommendations.title: Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: Suffering from insomnia, disturbed loner Travis Bickle takes a job as a New York City cabbie, haunting the streets nightly, growing increasingly detached from reality as he dreams of cleaning up the filthy city.

recommendations.title: Army of Darkness
recommendations.overview: Ash, a handsome, shotgun-toting, chainsaw-armed department store clerk, is time warped backwards into England's Dark Ages, where he romances a beauty and faces legions of the undead.

recommendations.title: Funny Games
recommendations.overview: Two psychotic young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic "games" with one another for their own amusement.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil
recommendations.overview: When Boom suffers abandonment and abuse by Prathan, she decides to use black magic to take revenge on him and his family.

recommendations.title: The Exterminator
recommendations.overview: When a man's best friend is killed on the streets of New York, he transforms into a violent killer, turning New York into a war zone.

recommendations.title: The Prince of Tides
recommendations.overview: A troubled Southern man talks to his suicidal sister's psychiatrist about their family history and falls in love with her (and New York City) in the process.
